titlebar.newVersionFound: New version v{{version}} available, click to view

account.passwordSavedPlaceholder: Password saved, leave empty to keep current
account.accountManageDesc: Switch or manage saved login profiles
account.noSavedAccountsTip: Click the button above to add an account
account.autoExitAfterLoginDesc: Automatically close the app after authentication
account.deleteAccountMessage: Are you sure you want to delete account "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

network.adapterSettingsDesc: Configure primary and backup network adapters
network.dnsOptimizationDesc: Recommended: Alibaba DNS + Tencent DNS with DoH encryption
network.clickToCheckDns: Click "Check DNS" to view current DNS configuration
network.dnsNotRecommended: Not using recommended DNS. Consider setting Alibaba (223.5.5.5) + Tencent (1.12.12.12) DNS manually
network.dnsDohNotEnabled: DNS DoH encryption not enabled. Enable it in Windows Settings → Network → DNS Encryption
network.dnsRecommendedNoDoh: Using Recommended DNS, DoH Not Enabled
network.noDnsServers: No DNS servers configured (using DHCP auto)
network.dohNotSupported: DoH configuration not supported on this system (requires Windows 11 or Windows Server 2022+). You can still set recommended DNS servers

monitor.detectionRunning: Network status detection service is running
monitor.detectionStopped: Network status detection service is stopped
monitor.autoStartDetectionDesc: Automatically run network status detection on app startup
monitor.autoExitWhenOnlineDesc: Automatically close the app when logged in status is detected
monitor.autoLoginWhenReadyDesc: Automatically login when authentication gateway is available
monitor.campusNetworkVerificationDesc: Only authenticate when specified campus Wi-Fi or gateway is detected
monitor.campusNetworkNameTip: Leave empty to use default i-wxxy, or enter a custom name
monitor.campusGatewayTip: Leave empty to use default gateway 10.2.127.254, or enter a custom address
monitor.detectionLogicStep1: 1. Network name check → Compare current connection name (default: i-wxxy)
monitor.detectionLogicStep2: 2. /18 subnet check → Whether adapter IP and campus gateway are in the same /18 subnet
monitor.detectionLogicStep3: 3. Gateway ping check → Whether campus gateway is reachable (default: 10.2.127.254)
monitor.detectionLogicAny: Any one of the above conditions is met = on campus network
monitor.autoExitNonCampusDesc: Minimize to tray after 30s on non-campus network, force quit after another 30s (Ctrl+Shift+C to cancel)

quality.scheduledTestDesc: Automatically test network latency at intervals
quality.testDetailsDesc: Latency test results for each node
quality.udpHighLatencyWarning: UDP latency is much higher than TCP, may be QoS throttled. Consider enabling DoH
quality.tlsExplanationDetail: — Transport Layer Security protocol, the encryption layer for HTTPS connections. TLS 1.3 is the latest fast handshake version, TLS 1.2 is the fallback version. High TLS latency may indicate distant servers or network congestion.
quality.ttfbExplanationDetail: — Time from sending HTTP request to receiving the first byte from the server, reflecting server processing speed. Baidu ~20-50ms, video platforms ~50-200ms. Can be skipped in settings.
quality.contentTransferExplanationDetail: — Time to read the complete HTTP response body, significantly affected by page size. Can be skipped to greatly reduce detection time and latency values.

speedtest.speedTestDesc: Choose a speed test website below for professional testing in your browser
speedtest.speedTestTip: The following websites provide professional network speed testing services, including download speed, upload speed, latency, and jitter. Click to open in your browser.
speedtest.speedTestCnDesc: Most popular speed test platform in China, supports speed test, Ping, and jitter
speedtest.speedtestOoklaDesc: The world's most authoritative speed test, wide node coverage, stable results
speedtest.ustcTestDesc: University of Science and Technology of China speed test, education network node coverage
speedtest.neuTestDesc: Northeastern University speed test, CERNET education network node
speedtest.buptTestDesc: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications speed test, IPv4/IPv6 dual-stack
speedtest.fastComDesc: By Netflix, minimalist speed test, focused on download bandwidth
speedtest.chinaZTestDesc: Webmaster speed test, multi-node testing with Ping and traceroute
speedtest.ipCnTestDesc: Simple speed test tool, also shows IP and DNS information
speedtest.speedTestNote1: Speed test results are affected by network environment, server location, ISP, etc. It's recommended to cross-compare using multiple platforms.
speedtest.speedTestNote2: For campus network testing, USTC, NEU, and BUPT education network speed test sites are recommended.

settings.switchLightDark: Switch between light and dark interface
settings.autoLaunchDesc: Automatically launch this app after Windows login
settings.autoExitAfterLoginDesc: Automatically close the app after authentication
settings.autoExitWhenOnlineDesc: Automatically close the app when online status is detected (background check trigger)
settings.silentStartDesc: Automatically hide window to tray on auto-start
settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Hide to system tray when clicking the close button
settings.defaultPanelDesc: Select the panel to display automatically on app startup
settings.enableNotificationDesc: Send desktop notifications for status changes, network congestion, etc.
settings.qualityDetectionDesc: Configure network latency and quality detection features
settings.enableQualityDetectionDesc: Show latency test results in Dashboard and Network Quality panels
settings.skipTtfbDesc: Don't measure time to first byte, latency includes only DNS+TCP+TLS handshake time
settings.skipContentDesc: Don't read response body content, significantly reducing detection time and latency values
settings.ttfbExplanationDetail: — Time from sending HTTP request to receiving the first byte from the server, reflecting server processing speed. When enabled, latency values are lower and more stable.
settings.contentTransferExplanationDetail: — Time to read the complete HTTP response body, significantly affected by page size (Baidu ~50ms, Bilibili ~200ms). Disabling greatly speeds up detection.
settings.networkLatencyExplanationDetail: — Application layer overhead beyond DNS/TCP/TLS/TTFB/content transfer. Usually caused by TCP retransmission, queuing delay, etc.
settings.recommendationDetail: For daily use, disable both for faster detection; enable when precise server performance analysis is needed.
settings.fixedGatewayDesc: Leave empty to use default gateway 10.2.127.254, or enter a custom address

log.systemLogDesc: View application logs and troubleshoot issues

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Campus network auto-login tool. Just a simple setup for automatic authentication on boot and auto-reconnect. Let's spend a minute to complete the initial setup.
onboarding.securityNote: Your account information will be encrypted and saved locally using Windows DPAPI
onboarding.fillLoginInfoDesc: Please enter your campus network authentication account and password
onboarding.selectNetworkAdapterDesc: Select the network adapter for campus network login. Usually "Auto Detect" works fine
onboarding.noConnectedAdapters: No connected adapters detected. Please make sure you are connected to the campus network (plug in cable or connect to WiFi)
onboarding.readyDesc: The following information has been configured. Click the button to start your first login
onboarding.skipSetupDesc: You can reopen the guide from Settings later, but you'll need to configure login information manually

about.aboutDesc: View app information and check for updates
about.checkFailed: Update check failed. Please check your network connection
about.githubApiLimited: GitHub API access limited, please try again later
about.switchDownloadSource: Slow download? Click to switch source
about.installNote: Clicking install will launch the installer. The current app may need to close
about.dualAdapterSupportDesc: Compatible with various campus network authentication methods
about.multiAccountManageDesc: Easily switch and save multiple accounts

dashboard.getNewIpDesc: Change MAC to get new IP

panel.dashboardDesc: Real-time network status and login verification monitoring
panel.accountDesc: Manage auto-login settings and notification options
panel.monitorDesc: Detect network login status and login availability

panel.settingsDesc: Adjust app appearance and startup behavior
panel.logDesc: View application logs and troubleshoot issues

themeDialog.desc: Choose your favorite color scheme and interface mode
